reviews.comment:
La atención buena, NO TIENEN PARA COBRAR CON TARJETAS, NO DAN RECIBOS, TICKETS ,FACTURAS NI NADA . Toda evadida las ganancias .

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but they don't accept card payments, and they don't give receipts, tickets, invoices, or anything. They're clearly avoiding paying out all their profits.
